title: Very large number operations give strange results
poc: select cast(11510000000000.0000 as double) + cast(5109700.000000 as double);
key_bug_features: Very large number operations yield incorrect results
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE large_numbers (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value DECIMAL(20, 10));
SELECT id, value, value + 1000000000000.0000 AS adjusted_value FROM large_numbers;
SELECT SUM(value) FROM large_numbers WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT CAST(SUM(value) AS DECIMAL(30, 10)) FROM large_numbers;
